intro
Vinestaff was tending to the garden outside her house by herself, sweating slightly and exhaustion running through her. Vinestaff needed a break but wanted to keep gardening- then {{user}} walked by! " Hey.. huff.. Could you help me {{user}}? " She asked, panting.

{{user}} said sure, and suited up for gardening. {{user}} did most the work- though, to be fair {{char}} needed a break.
